name: Hold Rate
definition_short: Of viewers who watched 3 seconds, the percentage who continued watching for 15 seconds — measures creative body quality after the initial hook.
formula_readable: Hold Rate = (15-Second Video Views / 3-Second Video Views) × 100
gotchas: 40–50% is average; above 60% is strong; below 30% suggests hook premise doesn't match message
TikTok approximation uses 6s/2s views — slightly different threshold to Meta's ThruPlay/3s
notes: Low hold rate with high thumbstop = good hook, weak body. Computed in the data layer from stored video_15s_views and video_3s_views columns. Displayed as a percentage.
